calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Continued To Feb-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Nichole Rodich, #11604.

Tito Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Joseph Smith.
Default was entered against defendant on October 8, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on December 10, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, and against the Defaulted Defendant Joseph Smith as follows:

Defendant Joseph Smith is enjoined and restrained from being within 150 yards of any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, and is therefore ordered to stay away at least 150 yards from any and all San Francisco Housing Authority property, perpetually pursuant to California Code of Civil Procedure Section 526.

Judgment for Injunctive Relief was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Continued To Jan-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
